name: O-2 global --dry-run: /standards-add --dry-run reports the plan without appending to STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && touch .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && before=$(wc -c < .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" --url https://example.test/style --id ex --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; after=$(wc -c < .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml); [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "$before" -eq "$after" ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo dry_run 1>&2
